name: Cheese Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar in a large bowl.
2. Add the cheese and blend well.
3. Make a well in the center of the mixture.
4. Combine the egg, milk, and melted margarine.
5. Add the liquid ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring until just moistened and no flour streaks remain.
6. Spoon the mixture into muffin tins sprayed with non-stick spray, filling 2/3 full.
7. Bake at 400 degrees F. for 20 to 25 minutes or until done and lightly browned.
8. Serve warm.
